name: paper-chaser-core
title: Paper Chaser Guided Tool Set
description: Low-context guided package for the safe default Paper Chaser experience. Start with research, reuse searchSessionId with follow_up_research or inspect_source, use resolve_reference for citations and identifiers, and use get_runtime_status when environment behavior looks inconsistent. This package matches PAPER_CHASER_TOOL_PROFILE=guided.
